title: Enterprise chief executives
role_summary: Leads whole companies or diversified business groups.

title: Operations and growth heads
role_summary: Runs scale, expansion, and cross-functional execution.

title: Business unit directors
role_summary: Owns category, regional, or line-of-business performance.

title: Operations managers
role_summary: Coordinates staffing, workflow, schedules, and site execution.

title: Sales and category managers
role_summary: Owns channels, categories, and commercial targets.

title: HR and admin managers
role_summary: Handles people operations, policy, and facilities administration.

title: Software engineers
role_summary: Builds product features, services, and internal platforms.

title: Platform and data engineers
role_summary: Owns infrastructure, pipelines, and reliability tooling.

title: QA and automation engineers
role_summary: Automates testing, release checks, and quality workflows.

title: Civil engineers
role_summary: Designs roads, buildings, drainage, and project packages.

title: Mechanical and electrical engineers
role_summary: Works on plant systems, machines, and electrical assets.

title: Architects and design engineers
role_summary: Creates plans, drawings, and design specifications.

title: Physicians
role_summary: Diagnoses patients and makes treatment decisions.

title: Dentists and pharmacists
role_summary: Provides oral care or medicine-dispensing expertise.

title: Diagnostic specialists
role_summary: Interprets tests, scans, and specialist clinical evidence.

title: Hospital nurses
role_summary: Delivers bedside care, medication, and ward coordination.

title: Critical-care nurses
role_summary: Supports ICU, emergency, and post-operative settings.

title: Community health nurses
role_summary: Handles outreach, maternal care, and field visits.

title: School teachers
role_summary: Teaches classroom subjects in school settings.

title: Subject tutors
role_summary: Provides focused exam and subject coaching.

title: Skills and language instructors
role_summary: Trains spoken English, vocational, or employability skills.

title: Accountants and auditors
role_summary: Prepares books, audits, and compliance reports.

title: Financial analysts and planners
role_summary: Builds forecasts, budgets, and business analysis.

title: HR and compliance specialists
role_summary: Owns policy, controls, hiring analytics, and governance.

title: IT support engineers
role_summary: Handles incidents, issue resolution, and user support.

title: System and network operators
role_summary: Monitors infrastructure, uptime, and operational systems.

title: ERP and implementation support
role_summary: Supports rollouts, tickets, and business-system configuration.

title: Executive assistants
role_summary: Manages calendars, meetings, and leadership coordination.

title: Office coordinators
role_summary: Runs records, correspondence, and workflow follow-ups.

title: Data-entry and document clerks
role_summary: Maintains digital forms, records, and repetitive documentation.

title: Billing clerks
role_summary: Prepares invoices, bills, and transactional records.

title: Accounts and payroll clerks
role_summary: Processes payroll, ledger entries, and reconciliations.

title: Inventory and record clerks
role_summary: Updates stock logs, dispatch records, and back-office counts.

title: Front-desk receptionists
role_summary: Greets visitors, manages appointments, and handles front desk flows.

title: Call-centre agents
role_summary: Resolves customer queries over phone and chat.

title: Customer-service desk clerks
role_summary: Handles service counters, complaint logging, and follow-up.

title: Housekeeping attendants
role_summary: Cleans rooms, facilities, and hospitality spaces.

title: Food-service stewards
role_summary: Supports restaurant floor and serving operations.

title: Catering helpers
role_summary: Assists bulk food service and event catering workflows.

title: Childcare workers

title: Elder and patient attendants
role_summary: Supports mobility, hygiene, and routine care needs.

title: Beauty and wellness aides
role_summary: Provides salon, wellness, and personal-care assistance.

title: Retail sales associates
role_summary: Sells goods in stores, showrooms, and branded outlets.

title: Counter sales staff
role_summary: Handles billing and walk-in product enquiries.

title: Field-promotion demonstrators
role_summary: Promotes products through demos and direct customer interaction.

title: Vegetable growers
role_summary: Grows seasonal vegetables for market sale.

title: Fruit growers
role_summary: Manages orchards and fruit production cycles.

title: Nursery growers

title: Dairy workers

title: Poultry workers
role_summary: Handles broiler or layer farm routines.

title: Livestock handlers

title: Mixed livestock farmers

title: Agri-entrepreneur growers

title: Fishery labourers
